translations.en: a short, barefooted crazy man.
translations.zh: 矮小、赤腳、瘋瘋癲癲的男子。

translations.en: "At last! I knew you'd come to steal my @shoes someday! But I was too smart for you!"
translations.zh: 「終於來了！我就知道你哪天會來偷我的@shoes（鞋）！但我比你聰明！」

translations.en: "You see, I HAVE NO SHOES!"
translations.zh: 「你看，我根本沒有鞋！」

translations.en: "A clever ploy, pretending to be friendly..."
translations.zh: 「裝出一副友善的面孔，真是狡猾的把戲……」

translations.en: "But if I told you my name was @Bonn, then you could work foul magic to destroy my mind..."*
translations.zh: 「但若我告訴你我的名字是@Bonn（邦恩），你就能施展邪術摧毀我的心智……」*

translations.en: "I'll not fall for your tricks!"
translations.zh: 「我不會上你的當！」

translations.en: "Who told you that? Alas, I am undone! I must flee!"
translations.zh: 「誰告訴你的？唉，我完了！我得逃！」

translations.en: "I have no job, nor shoes, nor any such thing."
translations.zh: 「我沒有工作，沒有鞋，什麼都沒有。」

translations.en: "But I've learned from my misfortune, learned never to @trust anyone, let alone to @love."
translations.zh: 「但我從不幸中學到了東西——學到了永遠不要@trust（信任）何人，更別說去@love（愛）了。」

translations.en: "I threw my shoes into the @sea when I saw you coming!"
translations.zh: 「我一看見你來就把鞋丟進@sea（海）了！」

translations.en: "I trusted @Hawkins once, and it led to nothing but despair."
translations.zh: 「我曾信任過@Hawkins（霍金）斯，但那只帶來了絕望。」

translations.en: "Oh how I envy him his peaceful @sleep!"
translations.zh: 「哦我多麼羨慕他能安詳地@sleep（長眠）！」

translations.en: "Death's embrace is the only true @comfort a man can find in this @world."
translations.zh: 「死亡的懷抱是人在這個@comfort（世界）能找到的唯一真正@world（慰藉）。」

translations.en: "A good chair is worth a thousand @bumberchutes."
translations.zh: 「一把好椅子抵得上一千個@bumberchutes（布博）舒特。」

translations.en: "Who told you about those? It's supposed to be a @secret!"
translations.zh: 「誰告訴你那些的？那本該是個@secret（秘密）！」

translations.en: "Flat as a pancake, and twice as tasty!"
translations.zh: 「像薄餅一樣扁，卻好吃兩倍！」

translations.en: "Love is a slippery sled that flips over and pins you to the slope."
translations.zh: 「愛情是一輛打滑的雪橇，它會翻轉，把你壓在坡上。」

translations.en: "And then, at night, the ice @weasels come."
translations.zh: 「然後，在夜裡，冰@weasels（鼬鼠）就來了。」

translations.en: "If you're lucky, they'll @kill you!"
translations.zh: 「若你走運，它們會把你@kill（殺死）！」

translations.en: "The buzzing, they're always buzzing in my head."
translations.zh: 「那嗡嗡聲，它們一直在我腦中嗡嗡作響。」

translations.en: "I can @help you! I'm the only @sane one left."
translations.zh: 「我能@help（助）！我是唯一剩下的@sane（正常）人。」

translations.en: "All the others LOST THEIR SHOES!"
translations.zh: 「其他人都把鞋子弄丟了！」

translations.en: "Go to the Shrine of Honesty, and stand just to the east of it."
translations.zh: 「去誠實聖壇，站在它正東方。」

translations.en: "Take 3 steps north, 2 steps west, 5 steps south, and 4 steps east."
translations.zh: 「往北3步，往西2步，往南5步，往東4步。」

translations.en: "Then eat some @grapes, and all will become clear to you!"
translations.zh: 「然後吃些@grapes（葡萄），一切就會清晰！」

translations.en: "Mark my words!"
translations.zh: 「記住我的話！」

translations.en: A strange light comes into his eyes. "The map? The secret treasure map?"
translations.zh: 他的眼神突然閃過異樣光芒。「地圖？那張秘密寶藏地圖？」

translations.en: "I still have it, right here in my @house. Do you want it?"
translations.zh: 「我還有，就在我的@house（房子）裡。你想要嗎？」

translations.en: "I lived on the sea, and I'll die not far from it. Then my @basement can be my tomb."
translations.zh: 「我在海邊生活，也將在海邊附近死去。到那時，我的@basement（地）下室就是我的陵墓。」

translations.en: "Too well hidden for the likes of you to find!"
translations.zh: 「藏得太好了，像你這樣的人根本找不到！」

translations.en: "My shoes will be very happy there, @dancing with the fishies!"
translations.zh: 「我的鞋在那裡會很開心，和小魚兒@dancing（共舞）！」

translations.en: "They'll dance a @waltz, I doubt it not!"
translations.zh: 「它們會跳@waltz（華爾）滋的，我毫不懷疑！」

translations.en: He begins laughing hysterically.
translations.zh: 他開始歇斯底里地大笑。

translations.en: "Farewell, sweet enemy. I love you more than my own death!"
translations.zh: 「再見，甜蜜的敵人。我愛你勝過愛我自己的死亡！」

translations.en: "You're not one of @us!"
translations.zh: 「你不是@us（我們）的人！」

translations.en: "We know who @we are..."
translations.zh: 「@we（我們）知道自己是誰……」

translations.en: "Me and the @others."
translations.zh: 「我和那些@others其他人。」

translations.en: "By the time you find out, it will be too @late!"
translations.zh: 「等你發現的時候，就已經太@late（遲）了！」

translations.en: "I won't tell you because..."
translations.zh: 「我不告訴你，因為……」

translations.en: "Sometimes the @bees in my head almost drive me @mad!"
translations.zh: 「有時候腦袋裡的@bees（蜜蜂）幾乎把我逼@mad（瘋）！」

translations.en: "Good! You can't have it anyway!"
translations.zh: 「太好了！你反正也拿不到！」

translations.en: "Too bad! I've hidden it well, and it will go to my grave with me!"
translations.zh: 「可惜！我藏得很好，它會跟我一起進墳墓！」

translations.en: "I'll @die all the better for still having it!"
translations.zh: 「還留著它，@die（死得）更安心！」

translator_notes: 邦恩是偏執的赤腳瘋子，曾信任霍金斯受騙。語言充滿荒誕邏輯和矛盾。有寶藏地圖但拒絕給出。bumberchute為原文發明詞，音譯「布博舒特」。
